name: /prompt-rollback: rejects when only one version exists (nothing to roll back to)
command:
mkdir -p prompts && printf -- '- id: rsc-reviewer
  versions:
    - {version: 2.0.0, file: prompts/rsc-reviewer/v2.0.0.md, hash: sha256:S, created: 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z, eval_pass_rate: 0.9, regression_from_prior: 0, status: active}
' > prompts/registry.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/prompt-rollback.sh" rsc-reviewer
